character_description:
A theatrical emcee stage fighter with swept dark hair, black tank top, black plaid kilt with red and white lines, white socks, black-and-white sneakers, and a handheld microphone. The silhouette is compact and expressive: microphone hand leading, plaid skirt motion, cabaret confidence.
Silhouette: upright performer stance with strong arm lines and kilt flare.
Clothing: black tank, black plaid kilt, white socks, black-and-white sneakers.
Hair: dark, swept and stage-ready.
Accessories: handheld microphone, wrist jewelry, spotlight effects.
Attitude: teasing, dramatic, crowd-commanding.
Distinctive traits: feedback waves, applause sparks, command-stage movement.

punch.name: Cue Punch
punch.description: Quick microphone-hand jab with a bright stage-pop impact.

kick.name: Kilt Sweep
kick.description: Low sweeping kick with a readable skirt flare and grounded recovery.

special_1.name: Feedback Check
special_1.description: Projects microphone feedback as a mid-height sonic burst.

special_2.name: Spotlight Command
special_2.description: Surges forward under a cone of light and pops the opponent with applause sparks.
